title: pittosporum humile
intro: Pittosporum humile, also known as New Zealand laurel, is a small to medium-sized evergreen tree native to New Zealand. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues, respiratory problems, and skin irritations. Pittosporum humile has various health benefits, including its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The leaves of the plant are often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
